title: Runs and records galore as England beat India to seal ODI series win | Cricket News
description: Ben Duckett hits a record-breaking 141 to help England beat India by 27 runs in a thrilling series decider at Lord's, with the victory also securing a 2-1 serie

blocks.text: Record-breaking cricket news: Runs and records galore as England beat India to seal ODI series win. Ben Duckett hits a record-breaking 141 to help England beat India by 27 runs in a thrilling series decider at Lord's, with the victory also securing a 2-1 series win.
